brand_identity.name: Kissan AI
brand_identity.visual_theme: Deep Indigo backgrounds with glowing warm gradients (Sunrise/Sunset)

usage.headings: Outfit - Bold/ExtraBold. Tracking tight for large text.
usage.body: Manrope - Regular/Medium. Excellent legibility for numbers and data.
usage.ui_elements: Manrope - SemiBold for buttons and tabs.

gradients.sunset_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#E67E22] via-[#C0392B] to-[#8E44AD]

navigation.style: Fixed bottom, glassmorphism effect, active state has glowing indicator

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 hover:from-orange-600 hover:to-red-700 text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20 rounded-full font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full transition-all

cards.base: bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: hover:border-orange-500/50 hover:shadow-orange-500/10 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer group

inputs.style: bg-slate-950/50 border-white/10 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-orange-500/20 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 rounded-xl h-12

onboarding.description: Indian farmer in field at sunset, silhouettes

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text on gradient backgrounds uses drop-shadow-md for readability.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings in Orange-500 for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icons must have descriptive aria-labels (e.g., 'Voice Search', 'Upload Image').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to support the new color palette extension and animations.
3. CSS VARIABLES: Replace the contents of the :root and .dark blocks in index.css with the values provided in 'colors.css_variables_override'.
4. LAYOUT: Create a 'Layout.js' component that handles the bottom navigation and mobile constraints.
5. NAMASTE SCREEN: The splash screen should use the 'onboarding.hero_bg' image with a heavy gradient overlay and the text 'Namaste' in large Outfit font.
6. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When using shadcn components (Card, Button, Input), apply the classes defined in 'components' section of this JSON.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors separate good from extraordinary.
